original: a rainbow scale decorated “Scales of Color” injector

Produced by Xenogen Biotech and funded by private gryvain investors, this injector will change the color of the user’s scales, chitin, and most other types of "hard" skin. \n\nAdditionally, this transformative includes an updated version of Xenogen’s patented ‘Pattern Blend’ technology, allowing for new patterns and colors that are not (yet) available in its sister product, Pickmentation. Attracting some scale and chitinless modders.
You pull the injector out but remember that you need to have scales in order use it!
translation: 你拔出注射器，却想起自己得有鳞片才能用这玩意儿！

original: A quick look at the injector reveals the tap-to-link emblem. Grabbing your codex and tapping the injector to it, the typical permission-to-link pop up [silly|pops up|appears]. A quick tap later and the interface appears. \n\n\t“Scales of color can only do one of the following per dose: change color of scales/chitin, alter, remove, or create body patterns/markings.” is printed in bold at the top of the program. There are two buttons below it, one for changing your scale/chitin color[pc.hasPartScales any||[pc.hasPartChitin any|| (which you won’t be using)]], and one for altering your body patterns/markings.
translation: 你快速扫一眼注射器，便看到了轻触连接的标志。你取出智典，将注射器搭在上面，一个标准的权限连接弹窗随即浮现[silly|pops up|appears]。轻点确认后，界面便展现在眼前。\n\n\t程序顶部用粗体印着：“五彩斑鳞每剂仅可实现以下功能之一：改变鳞片/甲壳颜色，或改变、移除、创造身体纹样/斑纹。”下方有两个按钮，一个用于改变鳞片/甲壳颜色[pc.hasPartScales any||[pc.hasPartChitin any||（这个你用不上）]]，另一个用于改变身体图案/斑纹。

original: “Recoloring ".concat(compressToList(a),", please pick your color” is shown at the top of the page.. ")
translation: 页面顶部显示“正在重新着色".concat(compressToList(a),"，请选择想要的颜色”。")

original: nothing. Waiting for another minute with nothing happening, leads you to a single conclusion: Something must be preventing you from changing your [pc.hasPartScales any|scale][pc.hasPartChitin any|[pc.hasPartScales any| and ]chitin] color.

You adjust the selector to recolor your body markings to "+{var0}+" and press the medipen to your sternum. There’s a quiet hiss from the device, followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site over your whole body. When the tingling finally ends you pull out your codex to check your reflection, finding that the [pc.skinAccent] of your [pc.accentMarkingsNoun] has changed to "+{var1}+".

original: You adjust the selector to remove your body markings and press the medipen to your sternum. There’s a quiet hiss from the device, followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site over your whole body. When the tingling finally ends you pull out your codex to check your reflection, finding that your body no longer has [pc.accentMarkings].
